title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Star Bazaar

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Star Bazaar
jsonLd.description:
Star Bazaar invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Star Bazaar:
Star Bazaar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar!
